channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇸🇩 Sudan Accuses Ethiopia of Drone Attacks, Recalls Ambassador
item.description: Sudan military accuses Ethiopia and UAE of drone strikes on Khartoum, recalling its ambassador from Addis Ababa as regional tensions escalate.

item.title: 🇦🇲🇪🇺 Armenia Hosts Historic EU Summit as Yerevan Shifts Away from Russia
item.description: Armenia hosts first-ever European Union summit in Yerevan, marking a deepening of ties that signals a strategic pivot away from Moscow.

item.title: 🇸🇦🇦🇪 Saudi-UAE Rift Deepens Over Energy Policy and Regional Conflicts
item.description: Tensions between Gulf allies mount over OPEC energy quotas and diverging approaches to regional conflicts, raising questions about Gulf unity.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Secret Service Shoots Gunman Near White House
item.description: Secret Service returned fire at an armed individual near the White House, wounding him and briefly triggering a lockdown.

item.title: 💰 IMF Scraps Global Economic Outlook as Iran Conflict Drags On
item.description: International Monetary Fund says forecasts made three weeks ago are no longer relevant as the Iran conflict continues to reshape global markets.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Army fires Tomahawk from new Typhon launcher in Philippines drill
item.description: The US Army successfully test-fired a Tomahawk missile from its new Typhon land-based launcher during joint exercises in the Philippines, demonstrating enhanced long-range strike capabilities in the Indo-Pacific theater.

item.title: 🇹🇭🇰🇭 Thailand scraps 25-year Cambodia energy exploration agreement
item.description: Thailand terminated a quarter-century-old agreement with Cambodia on joint energy exploration in disputed waters, with Phnom Penh now initiating compulsory conciliation under UNCLOS.

item.title: 🇵🇰 Pakistan PM calls for ceasefire respect after Iran attacks UAE
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif urged respect for the fragile ceasefire as Pakistan continues mediation efforts between the US and Iran following Iranian attacks on the UAE.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia claims to have shot down nearly 300 Ukrainian drones overnight
item.description: The Russian Defense Ministry said it intercepted approximately 300 Ukrainian drones in a massive overnight attack, one of the largest drone barrages of the war.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK sanctions target Russia fighter recruitment and drone production
item.description: Britain announced sanctions against 35 individuals and entities involved in recruiting migrants to fight for Russia and in Iranian drone production for the war in Ukraine.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russian Missile Attack Kills Five at Ukrainian Gas Production Facilities
item.description: A Russian overnight missile and drone attack on Ukrainian gas production facilities killed five people, including two rescue workers, as Kyiv and Moscow exchanged rival ceasefire proposals around Victory Day commemorations.

item.title: ⚔️ Middle East Truce in Doubt as US and Iran Battle for Strait of Hormuz Control
item.description: The fragile truce in the Middle East was in jeopardy after the U.S. and Iran launched new attacks near the Strait of Hormuz, raising fears the conflict could escalate further.

item.title: 💰 IMF Chief Warns of Global Economic Damage if Middle East War Extends into 2027
item.description: IMF Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva warned that inflation is already picking up and the global economy could face a much worse outcome if the Middle East war drags into 2027 with oil prices hitting around $125 per barrel.

item.title: ⛴️ Iran War Gives Modest Boost to Thermal Coal Prices
item.description: Seaborne thermal coal prices in Asia rallied after the US-Israel war on Iran began, but gains remain modest compared to the spike seen during Russia invasion of Ukraine, with analysts noting limited upside.

item.title: 🇸🇪 Sweden arrests Chinese captain of seized Russia-linked tanker
item.description: Swedish authorities arrested the Chinese captain of a seized oil tanker with suspected Russian links on charges of false documents and seaworthiness violations. The arrest highlights ongoing European enforcement against sanctions evasion.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany's Merz faces deepest transatlantic crisis in decades
item.description: Chancellor Friedrich Merz marks one year in office confronting the most serious US-Germany rift in decades, as Trump threatens 25% auto tariffs and withdraws thousands of troops from Germany.

item.title: 🚗 US to proceed with 25% EU car tariffs hike
item.description: The US Trade Representative confirmed Washington will move forward with Trump's plan to raise EU auto import tariffs to 25%, deepening trade tensions with European allies already reeling from troop withdrawal announcements.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan defense chief visits Philippines for security cooperation
item.description: Japanese Defense Minister Shinjiro Koizumi traveled to the Philippines to witness international combat drills and deepen security ties, as Japan expands defense partnerships in the Indo-Pacific region.

item.title: ⛴️ Iraq offers steep oil discounts for Hormuz transit
item.description: Iraq is offering significant price discounts to buyers willing to transit the Strait of Hormuz despite ongoing conflict, attempting to maintain exports through the contested waterway.

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korea rebuffs Trump's call to join Hormuz mission after ship fired on
item.description: South Korea indicated it requires a UN mandate and global coalition before joining Trump's "Project Freedom" to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, after Iran reportedly fired on a South Korean cargo vessel.

item.title: 🇮🇳 India condemns Iran's Fujairah attack as oil prices surge
item.description: India condemned Iran's attack on the UAE's Fujairah oil hub that injured three Indian nationals, urging diplomacy as Middle East tensions drive oil prices higher.

item.title: 🇦🇺 Australia's central bank delivers third straight rate hike to 4.35%
item.description: The Reserve Bank of Australia raised rates for the third time this year, citing sticky inflation and the Middle East conflict's impact on global oil prices.

item.title: 🚗 Audi pledges cost cuts as Trump tariff plan threatens outlook
item.description: Volkswagen's Audi is pushing to become leaner as the German carmaker tries to offset waning sales in China and potential tariff impacts from Trump's trade policies.

item.title: ⛴️ Trump Broke OPEC, but the Consequences May Prove Costly
item.description: US military actions in Venezuela and Iran have weakened OPEC beyond expectations, but the strategic gains may come at the price of reduced influence over global oil markets and heightened regional instability.

item.title: ⚔️ US Launches Operation to Reopen Strait of Hormuz Under Fire
item.description: American forces began escorting commercial vessels through the Strait of Hormuz as Iranian attacks on UAE territory and shipping intensify, straining an already fragile ceasefire arrangement.
